items.title: Savannah Guthrie returns to NBC's Today show, as search for mother goes on
items.dek: Nancy Guthrie disappeared from her home in Tucson, Arizona, in what authorities believe was an abduction.
items.body: Nancy Guthrie disappeared from her home in Tucson, Arizona, in what authorities believe was an abduction.
items.author: IriLine Desk

items.title: Emergency jabs after 100 children die of suspected measles in a month in Bangladesh
items.dek: More than 100 people, mostly children, have been killed by measles since mid-March, officials suspect.
items.body: More than 100 people, mostly children, have been killed by measles since mid-March, officials suspect.
items.author: IriLine Desk

items.title: Nigerian army rescues 31 held after Easter church attack
items.dek: Five civilians were killed by the gunmen and their bodies were recovered at the scene, the army said.
items.body: Five civilians were killed by the gunmen and their bodies were recovered at the scene, the army said.
items.author: IriLine Desk
